restaurants.name: Casa Montaña
restaurants.signature_dish: Anchovies from Santoña, salt-cod croquettes with pine nuts, patatas bravas
restaurants.quote: Operating since 1836, this wood-lined bodega features thousands of bottles and traditional pintxo-style foods

restaurants.name: La Salita
restaurants.signature_dish: Clarified gazpacho, prawns three ways, asparagus dish
restaurants.quote: Tasting menu experience in converted family home emphasising vegetables and local ingredients, led by chef Begoña Rodrigo

restaurants.name: Ricard Camarena
restaurants.signature_dish: Aged citrus pith reduction; raw shrimp with coffee and coconut
restaurants.quote: A high-class psychedelic tea party inside a restored art deco factory with an on-site garden and the chef present at every service

restaurants.name: El Poblet
restaurants.signature_dish: Lacto-fermented white asparagus, asparagus ice cream meringue, reimagined all i pebre
restaurants.quote: Big-deal tasting menu restaurant transforming local dishes through theatrical presentations while maintaining soul

restaurants.name: Canalla Bistro
restaurants.signature_dish: Peruvian-style seabass ceviche, Asian-style tuna tartare
restaurants.quote: More accessible offering from Michelin-starred chef Ricard Camarena serving international fusion dishes that aren't afraid of bold, spicy flavours

restaurants.name: Casa Carmela
restaurants.signature_dish: Paella Valenciana with chicken, rabbit, and snails
restaurants.quote: A century-old fixture renowned for perfect socarrat — the crispy rice bottom — achieved through wood-fire cooking

restaurants.name: Lienzo
restaurants.quote: 2025 Michelin-starred Mediterranean haute cuisine; the chef is known as 'the honey chef' and operates within a repurposed gallery space

restaurants.name: Acapulco Bar
restaurants.signature_dish: Hake croquettes in green chili, grilled sardines with mole, rabbit al pastor
restaurants.quote: Exciting recent opening elevating Mexican cuisine beyond typical offerings using seasonal local ingredients

restaurants.name: Agua Salada
restaurants.signature_dish: Cuttlefish in wasabi mayo, shrimp tartare, tuna tataki
restaurants.quote: Seafood specialist where flavours borrow from many different cultures — one of the writer's favourite meals from her most recent Valencia trip

restaurants.name: Asador Argentino Gordon 10
restaurants.signature_dish: Ribeye steak with baked potatoes and grilled vegetables
restaurants.quote: Argentinian steakhouse serving a truly excellent ribeye steak, done simply, with some of the best service in the city

restaurants.name: Asador El Porteño
restaurants.signature_dish: Beef parrillada
restaurants.quote: Argentine steakhouse specialising in charcoal-grilled meats and traditional South American dishes in a welcoming atmosphere

restaurants.name: Askua
restaurants.signature_dish: Chuleta (steak), bull tail and marrow croquettes, steak sandwich
restaurants.quote: Restaurant promoting beef culture with top-quality cuts from a northern butcher, served with ceremonial reverence

restaurants.name: Augusta
restaurants.signature_dish: Mullet and basil ravioli, sage-and-butter veal Milanese, Focaccia di Recco
restaurants.quote: Northern Italian restaurant in a restored fisherman's cottage featuring rarely-seen regional Italian comfort food

restaurants.name: Bar Ricardo
restaurants.signature_dish: Razor clams, red prawns, grilled scallops
restaurants.quote: Institution operating since the 1940s with a seafood counter as the focal point and fast-paced service

restaurants.name: Bar Tonyina
restaurants.signature_dish: Tuna tartare in wagyu, false lasagna, Thai duck with peanut-soy glaze
restaurants.quote: Over-a-decade-old cozy tapas bar with low-temperature cooking and clever sauces — no fryer, no smoke

restaurants.name: Barbaric
restaurants.signature_dish: Fried oysters with mango-habanero salsa, duck tartare with gochujang
restaurants.quote: Old-school neighbourhood spot featuring high-end cuisine in a casual setting with natural wines and curated music

restaurants.name: Casa Baldo 1915
restaurants.signature_dish: Cantabrian hake in tempura with tartar sauce
restaurants.quote: Honours the traditions of a historic ultramarines shop while serving modern interpretations of Valencian cuisine

restaurants.name: Central Bar
restaurants.signature_dish: Almuerzo sandwich with pork loin, caramelised onion, and cheese on cacahuet roll
restaurants.quote: Ricard Camarena's casual almuerzo project inside Europe's largest fresh market — simple, excellent food

restaurants.name: El Almacén NCR
restaurants.signature_dish: Tako coreano (Korean octopus)
restaurants.quote: Chefs Raimon Moreno and Vanina Vila create vibrant creative cuisine reinterpreting global flavours through local, seasonal products

restaurants.name: El Aprendiz de Tapas
restaurants.signature_dish: Thai pork ribs, tuna ceviche, baked cheesecake
restaurants.quote: Minimalist venue with an eclectic menu where the kitchen nails absolutely everything, from European to Asian to Nikkei cuisines

restaurants.name: El Rodamón de Russafa
restaurants.signature_dish: Sweet and sour aubergine, duck spring rolls, pulpo, calamari
restaurants.quote: Modern, hipster venue offering a creative, fusion version of tapas and wine, blending Asian and Spanish flavours

restaurants.name: Fierro
restaurants.quote: One of Valencia's Michelin-starred restaurants in 2026

restaurants.name: Flama
restaurants.signature_dish: Steak tartare with smoke, grilled tellinas, Cantabrian turbot
restaurants.quote: Open-flame cooking venue with polished concrete and wine shelves, finishing meals with theatrical cotton candy

restaurants.name: Forastera
restaurants.signature_dish: Beach-caught mullet with chermoula, charred eggplant
restaurants.quote: Next-generation restaurant combining seasonal coastal flavours with Basque and North African influences

restaurants.name: Fraula
restaurants.quote: One of Valencia's Michelin-starred restaurants in 2026

restaurants.name: Giardino del Carmen
restaurants.quote: Sicilian-Mediterranean reinterpretation since 2019 using a Jasper oven with 100% vegetable charcoal for distinctive flavours

restaurants.name: Goya Gallery
restaurants.signature_dish: Fideuà, seafood paella, grilled scallops
restaurants.quote: Refined, welcoming spot serving excellent seafood and rice dishes with a polished yet unfussy atmosphere

restaurants.name: Hundred
restaurants.signature_dish: Burgers
restaurants.quote: Won the 2024 best burger in the world accolade, hand-crafted daily with artisanal brioche baked fresh each morning

restaurants.name: IDEM
restaurants.signature_dish: Clarita's Breakfast
restaurants.quote: Creative Mediterranean cuisine with exotic influences, co-owned by Jordi Lleixà and Naiara, gaining viral social media success

restaurants.name: Interno Mediterraneo
restaurants.signature_dish: Jamón y trufa pizza, Neapolitan-style pizza
restaurants.quote: Serendipitous find offering pillowy Neapolitan-style crusts with fabulous-quality toppings and cocktails

restaurants.name: Kaido Sushi Bar
restaurants.quote: One of Valencia's Michelin-starred restaurants in 2026

restaurants.name: Karak
restaurants.signature_dish: Shrimp ravioli with red curry sauce, salmon cured in soy sauce
restaurants.quote: Modern fine-dining from chef Rakel Cernicharo offering a ten-course tasting menu — a creative fusion of European and Asian flavours

restaurants.name: Kathmandu
restaurants.signature_dish: Chana masala, special Nepali curry with tamarind and peppers
restaurants.quote: Nepalese and North Indian restaurant where the food was great right down to the naan bread and the service

restaurants.name: L'Alquimista
restaurants.signature_dish: Ricotta-stuffed pasta in tomato-sage, carbonara, porchetta piadina
restaurants.quote: Hidden Italian pasta shrine with grandmother's recipes, browned butter, truffle aromas, and a sunny terrace

restaurants.name: La Cantina de Ruzafa
restaurants.signature_dish: Figatells (pork sandwich), cremaet (rum-flamed espresso)
restaurants.quote: Maintains the sacred almuerzo tradition with a daily-changing menu sourced from the market and their home garden

restaurants.name: La Pepica
restaurants.signature_dish: Paella Valenciana with garrofó beans, green beans, rosemary, and saffron
restaurants.quote: Long-established seaside venue specialising in traditional paella made with the classic Valencian ingredients

restaurants.name: La Pilareta
restaurants.signature_dish: Montaditos, mussels
restaurants.quote: Long-established bar where mussel shells are still thrown into crates in front of the bar as the staff have done for decades

restaurants.name: La Tasqueta del Mercat
restaurants.signature_dish: Bacalao croquettes, tuna tartare with chilli and peanut sauces
restaurants.quote: Neighbourhood restaurant offering set menus that are extremely good value for money, with croquettes crunchy on the outside and fluffy inside

restaurants.name: Le Favole
restaurants.signature_dish: Sgroppino (lemon sorbet, prosecco, vodka)
restaurants.quote: Italian restaurant providing comprehensive cuisine including pasta and pizza with curated Italian wines and a climatised terrace

restaurants.name: Lia Valencia
restaurants.quote: Serene venue with light tones and greenery emphasising shared entrées, fish, pasta, and rice at exceptional value

restaurants.name: Maremar
restaurants.signature_dish: Seafood paella
restaurants.quote: Coastal restaurant offering ocean-flavoured paella with exceptional charcoal-grilled vegetables and uninterrupted sea views

restaurants.name: Memoria Gustativa
restaurants.signature_dish: Flan de huevo con papa y cebolla (deconstructed tortilla española)
restaurants.quote: Founded by three young chefs, this taberna reinterprets traditional Spanish flavours with modern technique and contemporary creativity

restaurants.name: Nozomi
restaurants.signature_dish: Seared salmon nigiri with mayo and roe, unagi (eel)
restaurants.quote: Possibly Spain's best sushi restaurant, celebrating Valencia's eel heritage with impeccable preparation

restaurants.name: Ostras Pedrín
restaurants.signature_dish: Tempura oysters, eel kabayaki-style
restaurants.quote: Blends Spanish and Japanese influences across an oyster bar with tinned fish, vermut, and cava

restaurants.name: Pelayo Gastro Trinquet
restaurants.signature_dish: Seafarer's titaina
restaurants.quote: Combines gastronomy with Valencian sports heritage in a restored 1868 pelota court with Thursday and Saturday matches

restaurants.name: Puerta del Mar
restaurants.quote: Gastronomic venue since 2009 serving paellas, rice dishes, and char-grilled meats while accommodating events up to 200 guests

restaurants.name: Rausell
restaurants.signature_dish: Sepionet, sautéed cigalas, patatas bravas
restaurants.quote: Family-run institution since the 1940s where off-duty chefs gather for pristine seafood and careful sourcing

restaurants.name: Restaurante Fum de Llum
restaurants.quote: Agronomist-directed establishment emphasising quality ingredients and traditional rice dishes sourced partly from its own organic orchard

restaurants.name: Restaurante Secret
restaurants.quote: Honest, proximally-sourced kitchen without additives, offering seasonal menus alongside paella demonstrations

restaurants.name: Riff
restaurants.quote: One of Valencia's Michelin-starred restaurants in 2026

restaurants.name: Saiti
restaurants.signature_dish: Red shrimp crudo with eel, almond rice, torrija with smoked milk ice cream
restaurants.quote: Six-table neighbourhood restaurant delivering a seasonal tasting menu celebrating local ingredients with warmth

restaurants.name: San Tommaso
restaurants.signature_dish: Pear-filled pasta with gorgonzola sauce
restaurants.quote: Famous Italian restaurant serving homemade Italian cuisine with high-quality ingredients and an extensive Italian wine selection

restaurants.name: Secreto de Anna
restaurants.quote: Rice-focused Mediterranean kitchen offering shared appetizers with complimentary beverages, noted for value and a warm wooden ambiance

restaurants.name: Taberna La Samorra
restaurants.neighbourhood: Old town, near Plaza de la Virgen
restaurants.signature_dish: Gildas (anchovy skewers), puntilla (fried baby squid), torrija de horchata
restaurants.quote: Snacking hole with always-cold vermut, cold beers, and playful traditional Spanish bites

restaurants.name: Taberna Pare Pere
restaurants.signature_dish: Seared tuna with pistachio sauce, langoustines with young garlic
restaurants.quote: Ultra-local spot known for its fish and seafood where the menu seems to be a general guideline rather than an accurate list

restaurants.name: Tasca Angel
restaurants.signature_dish: Butterflied sardines in garlicky green sauce
restaurants.quote: Standing-room-only spot established in 1946 delivering high-impact classic tapas from a husband-and-wife team

restaurants.name: Tasca Sorolla
restaurants.signature_dish: Red prawns, sardines, cuttlefish, lamb sweetbreads
restaurants.quote: Minimalist sizzling-plancha tavern run by owner-chef Ximo serving daily fresh ingredients with thoughtful wine pairings

restaurants.name: Timoteo Gastrobar
restaurants.signature_dish: Patatas bravas with sobrasada, roasted aubergine, tuna tataki
restaurants.quote: Spanish-international fusion serving family-style sharing plates — the writer says the food is simply this good

restaurants.name: Vaqueta Gastro Mercat
restaurants.signature_dish: Steak tartar of aged beef with egg yolk potatoes
restaurants.quote: Offers tapas, rice dishes, and braise-cooked meats with a sushi bar at dinner featuring Mediterranean-Japanese fusion

restaurants.name: Voltereta Bienvenido a Bali
restaurants.signature_dish: Iberian secret with peanut sauce
restaurants.quote: Jungle villa ambiance merging Japanese, Korean, Indian, and Balinese cuisines with vegetarian and vegan selections

restaurants.name: Voltereta Bienvenido a Manhattan
restaurants.signature_dish: Truffle omelette and cheesecake
restaurants.quote: Recreates a 1920s American speakeasy ambiance with live jazz music and contemporary takes on traditional cuisine

restaurants.name: Xanglot
restaurants.signature_dish: Arroz meloso with cured bonito and squash
restaurants.quote: Chef Sandra Jorge's innovative market-driven cooking celebrates Valencian roots through tasting menus featuring seasonal local products
